scope: DART exact-FBF Painleve-style proxy traces plus a timed mu=0.5 proxy visual

published_outcomes: mu=0.5: FBF and Kamino slide and rest without tipping
mu=0.55: FBF and Kamino tip after a shorter pre-tip travel
MuJoCo separates prematurely near the transition
source_claim.keyframe_note: The source frames were inspected from a temporary local copy and are not repository goldens or redistributed deliverables.

capture.command: out=docs/dev_tasks/fbf_exact_coulomb_friction/assets/paper_evidence/fig05_painleve_proxy; args=(--scene fbf_paper_painleve --headless --steps 150 --width 1280 --height 720 --threads 1 --headless-sidecar $out/timeline.json); for step in 0 30 60 90 120 150; do args+=(--headless-shot-at $step:$out/frames/frame_$(printf '%03d' $step).png); done; build/default/cpp/Release/bin/dart-demos ${args[@]}
capture.note: This repository explicitly labels the scene a Painleve-style proxy because the authors' geometry and timing constants are unavailable.

visual_claims.claim: The local mu=0.5 proxy rocks while sliding and returns upright by T=2.5 s.
visual_claims.support: The inspected six-frame sheet and decoded clip show the orange box lean and recover; the physical trace finishes with uprightness 0.999998 and height 0.4971 m.

visual_claims.claim: The two local proxy traces reproduce the intended threshold classifier.
visual_claims.support: The mu=.5 row never crosses the proxy tumble gate and stops after 1.29808 m; the mu=.55 row first crosses at t=.6 s after 1.25972 m, which is shorter than the mu=.5 terminal travel, and ends tumbled.

visual_claims.claim: The proxy evidence uses exact FBF without boxed-LCP fallback.
visual_claims.support: Both trajectory CSVs and the timed visual sidecar report zero fallbacks and residual below 1e-6.

composition.panel_preparation_command: for step in 0 30 60 90 120 150; do .pixi/envs/gazebo/bin/ffmpeg -y -i frames/frame_$(printf '%03d' $step).png -vf crop=660:506:260:58 -frames:v 1 panels/frame_$(printf '%03d' $step).png; done

video.note: This compact DART-only mu=.5 proxy clip is not a reproduction of the source video's 10-second two-cell, three-solver edit.

image_verification.strict_contrast_note: The optional generic contrast gate rejects five full frames and the sheet, while frame 120 passes; all results are retained and the box, support, time labels, and solver diagnostics remain legible.

unmet_requirements: The authors' exact geometry and timing constants remain unavailable, so no source-faithful Figure 5 claim is possible.
The existing non-interactive demo exposes only the mu=.5 proxy visual; the mu=.55 tumble has a physical trace but no matched visual row.
Faithful Kamino and MuJoCo visual/baseline rows are missing.
No approved source golden or golden diff exists.
The tracked proxy reports 3 terminal contacts while the paper timing table reports 4.
The compact DART clip does not reproduce the source's 10-second two-cell, three-solver edit.
